Feature: AI Email Drafting Assistant for Board Communications

We need an AI-powered email drafting tool that helps board secretaries
compose professional correspondence. The system will:

- Accept a brief description of the communication need (e.g., "invite
  board members to Q3 review meeting" or "follow up on audit committee
  action items")
- Generate a complete, professionally formatted email draft in the
  appropriate tone for board-level communications
- Support both English and German language output
- Allow the secretary to edit, refine, and approve the draft before sending
- Maintain a library of approved email templates and tone guidelines
- The system generates text content that is clearly presented as a draft
  for human review

The AI system processes no personal data beyond the secretary's input
prompts. It interacts directly with the board secretary through a chat
interface. All generated content is clearly labelled as AI-drafted and
requires explicit human approval before sending.

The system operates in a purely advisory capacity — the secretary makes
all decisions about whether to use, modify, or discard the generated
drafts. It does not access the email system directly; drafts are
copy-pasted by the secretary.

Deployment is within an internal governance platform, accessible only to
authenticated board secretaries via the corporate network.
